<?php require(__DIR__.'/../src/Twilio/autoload.php'); use Twilio\Rest\Client; use Twilio\CredentialProvider\ClientCredentialProviderBuilder; $accountSid = getenv('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID'); $token = getenv('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'); $clientId = getenv('OAUTH_CLIENT_ID'); $clientSecret = getenv('OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET'); $clientCredentialProvider = (new ClientCredentialProviderBuilder())->setClientId($clientId)->setClientSecret($clientSecret)->build(); $client = new Client(); $client->setCredentialProvider($clientCredentialProvider); $client->setAccountSid($accountSid); $messageList = $client->messages->read([],10); foreach ($messageList as $msg) { print("ID:: ". $msg->sid . " | " . "From:: " . $msg->from . " | " . "TO:: " . $msg->to . " | " . " Status:: " . $msg->status . " | " . " Body:: ". $msg->body ."\n"); }
